ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Aquatic Plants, Terrestrial Plants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's ecological characteristics */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent group (for hierarchical grouping) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., freshwater, marine, terrestrial) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location of the habitat */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the habitat location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the habitat location */,
  "environmental_factors_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the environmental factors associated with the habitat */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the habitat is protected */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the habitat record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the habitat record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitats_environmental_factors_id FOREIGN KEY ("environmental_factors_id") REFERENCES environmental_factors ("environmental_factors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being assessed */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat where the assessment occurred */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the species in the habitat */,
  "assessment_method_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the assessment method used */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the assessment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the version of the assessment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_assessment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_method_id") REFERENCES assessment_methods ("assessment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versioning ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, conservationist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the species data */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., biodiversity, population) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_classification" (
  "taxonomic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "conservation_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the conservation status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "environmental_factors_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental factor */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the environmental factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the environmental factor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_factors_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_methods" (
  "assessment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the method record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the method record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., species, habitat) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the entity */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the reference */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the reference was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the reference in the journal */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the reference */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expert_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expert assessment */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being assessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the species (e.g., healthy, declining) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the expert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expert_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
